scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix sdk && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix sdk
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
